name: layout/auto-grid
description: Media-query-free responsive grid — columns auto-fill based on available space.

meta.name: AutoGrid
meta.description: Media-query-free responsive grid — columns auto-fill based on available space.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum track width before items wrap to fewer columns

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing token step. Maps to the --cascivo-space-* scale, which intentionally skips 7/9/11 — use 6 or 8.

examples.title: Auto-filling grid
examples.description: Items fill available space and wrap when narrower than 12rem

whenToUse: Responsive card or tile grids that auto-fit columns to available width
Avoiding media queries — tracks wrap based on a minimum track width
whenNotToUse: A fixed, known column count — use Grid

related.name: Grid
related.reason: Use when an explicit column count is required

intent.a11yRationale: Pure layout primitive with no semantic role; does not affect the accessibility tree.
